'''dholangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yappy|yappy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-l-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yappy|yappy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dholangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dholangithi|dholangithi]] || [[word:dholangiji|dholangiji]] || [[word:dholangishi|dholangishi]] || [[word:dholangiki|dholangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dholanguthuthu|dholanguthuthu]] || [[word:dholangujuju|dholangujuju]] || [[word:dholangushushu|dholangushushu]] || [[word:dholangukuku|dholangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dholanguthu|dholanguthu]] || [[word:dholanguju|dholanguju]] || [[word:dholangushu|dholangushu]] || [[word:dholanguku|dholanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dholangufthuf|dholangufthuf]] || [[word:dholangufjuf|dholangufjuf]] || [[word:dholangufshuf|dholangufshuf]] || [[word:dholangufkuf|dholangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dholangethe|dholangethe]] || [[word:dholangeje|dholangeje]] || [[word:dholangeshe|dholangeshe]] || [[word:dholangeke|dholangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dholangothotho|dholangothotho]] || [[word:dholangojojo|dholangojojo]] || [[word:dholangoshosho|dholangoshosho]] || [[word:dholangokoko|dholangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dholangotho|dholangotho]] || [[word:dholangojo|dholangojo]] || [[word:dholangosho|dholangosho]] || [[word:dholangoko|dholangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dholangofthof|dholangofthof]] || [[word:dholangofjof|dholangofjof]] || [[word:dholangofshof|dholangofshof]] || [[word:dholangofkof|dholangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfthĂŻf|dholangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfjĂŻf|dholangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfshĂŻf|dholangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfkĂŻf|dholangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dholangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dholangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dholangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dholangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfthĂŻf|dholangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfjĂŻf|dholangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfshĂŻf|dholangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfkĂŻf|dholangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfthĂŻf|dholangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfjĂŻf|dholangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfshĂŻf|dholangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dholangĂŻfkĂŻf|dholangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dholangĂŠthĂŠ|dholangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dholangĂŠjĂŠ|dholangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dholangĂŠshĂŠ|dholangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dholangĂŠkĂŠ|dholangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dholangathatha|dholangathatha]] || [[word:dholangajaja|dholangajaja]] || [[word:dholangashasha|dholangashasha]] || [[word:dholangakaka|dholangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dholangatha|dholangatha]] || [[word:dholangaja|dholangaja]] || [[word:dholangasha|dholangasha]] || [[word:dholangaka|dholangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dholangafthaf|dholangafthaf]] || [[word:dholangafjaf|dholangafjaf]] || [[word:dholangafshaf|dholangafshaf]] || [[word:dholangafkaf|dholangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dholangasha|dholangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dholangshĂ«sha|dholangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dholangrosha|dholangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dholangmusha|dholangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dholangyasha|dholangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godholangnkshĂ«sha|godholangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godholangnkrosha|godholangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godholangnkmusha|godholangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godholangnkyasha|godholangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dholalangasha|dholalangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dholalangshĂ«sha|dholalangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dholalangrosha|dholalangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dholalangmusha|dholalangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dholalangyasha|dholalangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godholalangnkshĂ«sha|godholalangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godholalangnkrosha|godholalangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godholalangnkmusha|godholalangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godholalangnkyasha|godholalangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhelĂŠngasha|dhelĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhelĂŠngshĂ«sha|dhelĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhelĂŠngrosha|dhelĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhelĂŠngmusha|dhelĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhelĂŠngyasha|dhelĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhelĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|godhelĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhelĂŠngnkrosha|godhelĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhelĂŠngnkmusha|godhelĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhelĂŠngnkyasha|godhelĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dholfangasha|dholfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dholfangshĂ«sha|dholfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dholfangrosha|dholfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dholfangmusha|dholfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dholfangyasha|dholfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godholfangnkshĂ«sha|godholfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godholfangnkrosha|godholfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godholfangnkmusha|godholfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godholfangnkyasha|godholfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
